---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement for .axon
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem. E.g., "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

**Describe the solution**
What you'd like to see added or changed.

**Describe alternatives**
Any alternative solutions or formats you've considered.

**Additional context**
Links to related issues, PRs, or references.
